query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.projectId, ap.promptText, ap.detailedPlan, ap.generatedByAI, ap.createdAt 
FROM actionPlans ap 
JOIN projects p ON ap.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%tesawte%' 
ORDER BY ap.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 3;
